evals.expected_output: A structured bearish price action report for BTCUSDT fetched live from Binance. Should include trend structure (daily + weekly), S/R zones from weekly candles, Fibonacci levels, an active short setup or pending limit shorts, and an invalidation level.
expectations: The output includes the current BTCUSDT price fetched live from Binance
The output identifies daily trend as uptrend, downtrend, or sideway
The output lists at least 3 weekly S/R zones (resistance or support)
The output includes Fibonacci levels with at least 4 ratios (0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618)
The output includes either an active short setup with entry zone + stop loss + TP1 or a list of pending limit short setups
The output includes an invalidation level (price at which short thesis is off)

evals.prompt: btc có thể short không hôm nay? tôi đang nhìn daily chart
evals.expected_output: Same as eval 1 — a full bearish PA report in Vietnamese or mixed Vietnamese/English. Should directly answer whether a short setup exists today.
expectations: The output fetches live BTC price data (not a hardcoded or assumed price)
The output clearly states whether a short setup is currently active or not
The output includes stop loss and at least one take profit level if a setup exists
The output mentions the weekly trend direction to provide higher-timeframe context
The output includes an invalidation level for the short thesis

evals.prompt: phân tích setup short btc daily, tôi muốn biết entry, SL, TP và confidence
evals.expected_output: A detailed short-focused analysis with specific entry zone, stop loss, TP1/TP2, confidence rating, and reasoning bullets. Should also cover pending limit setups if no active setup.
expectations: The output includes an entry zone (two price levels) or a limit entry price
The output includes a stop loss price
The output includes at least TP1, ideally TP2 as well
The output rates confidence as high, medium, or low
The output provides reasoning for the setup (at least 2 bullet points explaining why)
The output fetches fresh data from Binance rather than using assumed prices
